violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Facility had no water at handwash sink. Person in charge stated they had been washing in bathroom at Monument. Hands must be washed before returning to work and after entering kitchen.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --There was no sanitizer on food truck for dishes or sanitizer cloths.

Water Supply. — --Water source or system was not of sufficient capacity to meet the demands of the food establishment. -No water available on food trailer. Person in charge stated that pipes had froze or pump was not working.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwash sink had plastic bin on top of it. There was no water at handwash sink.
